name: astrology-website
description: AstralSoul Vedic Astrology, Palmistry and Face Reading website

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const src = path.join('node_modules', '@fusionstrings', 'swiss-eph', 'wasm', 'swiss_eph.wasm'); const destDir = path.join('node_modules', '@fusionstrings', 'swiss-eph', 'lib', 'wasi'); const dest = path.join(destDir, 'swiss_eph.wasm'); if (fs.existsSync(src)) { fs.mkdirSync(destDir, { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync(src, dest); console.log('Fixed Swiss Ephemeris WASM path'); }"
